name: RoundZ
short_description: RoundZ is a solo-developed round-based survival zombie game, with each round becoming progressively harder as the zombies get more health and in bigger waves.
detailed_description:
RoundZ is an intense, round-based survival zombie game where the challenge grows with each round. As the rounds progress, the zombies become tougher, gaining more health and attacking in increasingly larger waves, testing your survival skills to the limit.

Game Modes

RoundZ offers two distinct modes to suit your playstyle:

  • Custom Mode

    • Start from any round of your choice (1, 5, 10, 15, or 20).

    • Choose your initial points, allowing you to experiment with strategies, push the game’s boundaries, and challenge your own limits as a player.

  • Normal Mode

    • Begin your journey at round 1 with zero points.

    • Progress naturally through the escalating difficulty for the ultimate survival experience.

Core Gameplay Features

  • Rise From Small to Fierce: Every player begins with a humble hunting knife. Earn points as you defeat zombies to purchase new weapons scattered around the map.

  • Manage Resources Wisely: Ammo isn’t infinite. Stock up at designated weapon locations or find crates scattered across the map to keep your arsenal loaded.

  • Explore and Unlock: Progress through the map by using points to open doors or clear obstacles, unlocking new areas and opportunities.

  • Strategic Buffs: Encounter mysterious gas containers that grant powerful buffs like increased health, faster reload speed, or self-revive capabilities. Be strategic—there’s a limit to how many buffs you can acquire, so choose wisely!

  • Upgrade Your Arsenal: Find a futuristic machine to enhance your weaponry. Upgrades include increased damage, faster reload speed, reduced aiming time, and aesthetic enhancements to keep you prepared for higher rounds.

  • Try Your Luck: Spice up the apocalypse with slot machines. Spend points to spin for exclusive, random weapons you won’t find elsewhere on the map. But beware—your gamble might leave you empty-handed, and the machine will relocate if used too many times.

Can you survive the endless waves? Plan your moves, spend your points wisely, and prove you have what it takes. Stay tuned as we reveal more about the game’s mechanics, features, and surprises that await you in the apocalyptic world of RoundZ!

supported_languages:
English, Spanish - Spain*, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
*languages with full audio support
